content.body: in hindsight I don't think the test262-harness/eshost transfer to the tc39 org was a good idea. they're increasing unfit for purpose and fail a number of tests due to bugs and outdated assumptions about fixture files
we went from a situation where it was not possible for anyone but an ex-delegate to maintain them, to a situation where any of us could step up but no-one has. I think that's still an improvement
